applications.tro_notes: BRELA verification pending. High-resolution trademark images not yet confirmed authentic.

audit_trail.note: Application submitted with all required documents and GePG payment confirmed.
Application auto-assigned to ACEM Bernard Okello.
Application assigned to TRO Grace Nyamwezi for preliminary assessment.
Preliminary assessment commenced. BRELA verification initiated.

applications.goods_description: Consumer electronics including mobile phones, TVs, refrigerators and washing machines
applications.tro_notes: All documents verified. BRELA confirmed trademark registration TZ-BRE-2022-09901 is valid and current. Trademark images match registered mark. No discrepancies found.

audit_trail.note: New recordation application submitted. Payment confirmed.
Auto-assigned to ACEM.
Application previewed and ACEM directed to proceed.
Assigned to TRO Grace Nyamwezi.
All documents valid. BRELA confirmed. Recommending approval.
ACEM approves recordation.
Forwarded recommendation to CI for final decision.
Application approved. Certificate generated and Register updated.
Certificate FCC-CERT-2026-035 auto-generated and sent to applicant.
Trademark TM-2026-005 migrated to Register.

applications.tro_notes: Missing certified copy of BRELA trademark registration certificate. Evidence of title document is a scanned photocopy and does not meet the certification requirement. Applicant must resubmit certified originals.

audit_trail.note: Application submitted with partial documents.
Auto-assigned to ACEM.
Assigned to TRO for assessment.
Documents incomplete. Applicant required to resubmit certified registration certificate within 5 working days.
Rectification request email sent to agent@kimalaw.co.tz

applications.tro_notes: BRELA verification shows the trademark registration certificate submitted (TZ-BRE-2020-08821) is in the name of TotalEnergies SE, France — not the applicant. Applicant has no legal standing to make this application. No Power of Attorney submitted.
applications.rejection_reason: Applicant does not hold title to the trademark. The registration TZ-BRE-2020-08821 is registered under TotalEnergies SE and no Power of Attorney was submitted to authorize this applicant.

audit_trail.note: Application submitted.
Applicant has no standing. BRELA confirms trademark not in applicant name.
Application rejected. Notification sent to applicant with stated reasons.
Renewal application with certified BRE certificate.
Renewal approved. Expiry updated to 2027-09-01.

inspections.goods_description: Carbonated soft drinks and flavoured beverages in 500ml PET bottles — 2000 cartons
inspections.flagged_reason: HS codes 2202.10 and 2202.90 fall under CI mandate. Goods cannot be released until FCC clears.

inspections.goods_description: Mobile handsets — feature phones in retail packaging bearing NOKIA logo — 500 units

trademark_match.note: Trademark NOKIA (TM-2026-004) is currently UNDER_REVIEW — not yet fully recorded. Goods detained pending resolution.

inspections.cso_inspection_notes: Physical inspection reveals Nokia branding on packaging but internal components do not match Nokia specifications. Model numbers on packaging differ from IMEI data. Suspected counterfeit/infringing goods.

seizure_report.goods_description: 500 mobile handsets bearing NOKIA trademark — suspected counterfeit
evidence_collected: Photos of packaging and IMEI labels
Sample 3 units collected for laboratory testing
seizure_report.dac_directives: Proceed with compoundment assessment. Assign ACEO.

inspections.goods_description: Packaged refined sugar — 25kg bags — 500 bags bearing AZAM brand

trademark_match.note: Trademark AZAM matches recorded trademark TM-2026-003. Valid until 2027-09-01.

inspections.cso_inspection_notes: All documentation verified. TANSAD matches goods. Trademark AZAM is validly recorded in FCC Register. Country of origin marking correct. Goods cleared.

inspections.goods_description: Electric blenders and food processors bearing PHILIPS trademark — 200 units

trademark_match.note: Trademark PHILIPS application still under rectification. Trademark not yet recorded. Goods detained.

inspections.cso_inspection_notes: PHILIPS trademark not in FCC Register. Goods suspected counterfeit. Voltage ratings inconsistent with genuine PHILIPS products. Packaging quality poor. Seizure initiated.

seizure_report.brand_owner_statement: The goods are confirmed counterfeit. Genuine Philips products of this model are not manufactured in China for this market.

enforcement_cases.goods_description: Counterfeit Philips electric blenders and food processors — 200 units

offloading_letter.addressed_to: Commissioner for Customs, Tanzania Revenue Authority
offloading_letter.contents: Following full payment of Compoundment Order COMP-2026-009, you are hereby directed to facilitate the offloading of 200 counterfeit Philips-branded electrical appliances (Container/Truck T 441 TUN) to the FCC Designated Counterfeit Goods Warehouse.

notifications.message: Your trademark SAFARI LAGER (TM-2026-002) will expire on 10 June 2026. Please submit a renewal application at least 30 days before expiry.
